title: Capacity Planning Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger capacity planning foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Capacity Planning Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Capacity Planning Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good capacity planning foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Capacity Planning Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
